`unsubscribe` | C→S | 取消订阅 | ✅ 已实现 | | `ping/pong` | 双向 | 心跳检测 | ✅ 已实现 | ### 五、任务拆分清单 #### 5.1 高优先级任务（P0）- v1.2.0 核心冲刺 ##### 阶段 1：前端项目搭建（2天） **任务1.1：初始化Vue 3项目** ```bash # 目标：创建可运行的Vue 3项目骨架 cd dashboard npm create vite@latest frontend -- --template vue-ts cd frontend npm install element-plus @element-plus/icons-vue npm install pinia vue-router axios echarts npm install -D sass @types/node ``` **验收标准**： - ✅ `npm run dev` 成功启动 - ✅ 访问 `http://localhost:5173` 显示欢迎页面 - ✅ TypeScript 配置正确 - ✅ Element Plus 组件可用 --- **任务1.2：配置项目基础结构** ```typescript // 需要创建的目录结构 src/ ├── views/ # 页面组件 │ ├── Dashboard.vue │ ├── Iterations.vue │ ├── Agents.vue │ └── Settings.vue ├── components/ # 通用组件 ├── services/ # API服务 │ ├── api.ts │ └── websocket.ts ├── stores/ # Pinia状态 │ ├── iteration.ts │ ├── agent.ts │ └── system.ts ├── router/ # 路由配置 │ └── index.ts ├── types/ # 类型定义 ├── utils/ # 工具函数 ├── styles/ # 样式文件 ├── App.vue └── main.ts ``` **验收标准**： - ✅ 目录结构创建完成 - ✅ Vue Router 配置4个页面路由 - ✅ Pinia 配置完成 - ✅ 基础布局组件（侧边栏+头部+内容区） --- ##### 阶段 2：服务层和状态管理（2天） **任务2.1：封装API客户端** ```typescript // services/api.ts import axios from 'axios' const apiClient = axios.create({ baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3000/api', timeout: 10000 }) // 请求拦截器 apiClient.interceptors.request.use(config => { // 添加认证 token（如果需要） return config }) // 响应拦截器 apiClient.interceptors.response.use( response => response.data, error => { // 统一错误处理 console.error('API Error:', error) return Promise.reject(error) } ) export default apiClient ``` **任务2.2：封装WebSocket客户端** ```typescript // services/websocket.ts export class DashboardWebSocket { private ws: WebSocket | null = null private reconnectTimer: any private handlers: Map = new Map() connect(url: string) { this.ws = new WebSocket(url) this.ws.onopen = () => { console.log('WebSocket connected') this.startHeartbeat() } this.ws.onmessage = (event) => { const { event: type, data } = JSON.parse(event.data) this.emit(type, data) } this.ws.onclose = () => { console.log('WebSocket disconnected') this.scheduleReconnect() } } on(event: string, handler: Function) { if (!this.handlers.has(event)) { this.handlers.set(event, []) } this.handlers.get(event)!.push(handler) } private emit(event: string, data: any) { const handlers = this.handlers.get(event) || [] handlers.forEach(handler => handler(data)) } } ``` **验收标准**： - ✅ API 调用正常 - ✅ WebSocket 连接成功 - ✅ 自动重连机制工作 --- ##### 阶段 3：主仪表盘页面（3天） **任务3.1：系统概览卡片组件** ```vue ``` **4个核心指标**： - 总迭代次数 - 成功率 - 平均耗时 - 当前运行Agent数 **任务3.2：Agent状态网格** ```vue ``` **10个Agent**： - 📊 产品经理 | 🏗️ 架构师 | 💻 前端开发 | ⚙️ 后端开发 | 🗄️ 数据库 - 🎨 UI设计 | 🧪 测试 | 🔒 安全 | 📝 文档 | 🖼️ 素材 **验收标准**： - ✅ 实时延迟 < 500ms - ✅ WebSocket 自动重连 - ✅ 支持10个Agent并发显示 - ✅ 响应式布局（桌面/平板） --- ##### 阶段 4：后端API完善（2天） **任务4.1：实现迭代相关API** ```typescript // routes/iterations.ts import { FastifyInstance } from 'fastify' export async function registerIterationRoutes( fastify: FastifyInstance, iterationService: any ) { // 获取迭代列表（分页） fastify.get('/iterations', async (request, reply) => { const { page = 1, limit = 20, status } = request.query as any const result = await iterationService.list({ page: Number(page), limit: Number(limit), filter: { status } }) return reply.send(result) }) // 获取迭代详情 fastify.get('/iterations/:id', async (request, reply) => { const { id } = request.params as any const iteration = await iterationService.findById(Number(id)) if (!iteration) { return reply.code(404).send({ error: 'Iteration not found' }) } return reply.send(iteration) }) // 获取当前运行迭代 fastify.get('/iterations/current', async (request, reply) => { const current = await iterationService.findCurrent() return reply.send(current) }) } ``` **任务4.2：完善WebSocket事件** ```typescript // services/realtime.service.ts export class RealtimeService { // 广播迭代状态变化 broadcastIterationStatus(data: IterationStatusChange) { this.broadcast('iteration.status_changed', data) } // 广播Agent状态变化 broadcastAgentStatus(data: AgentStatusChange) { this.broadcast('agent.status_changed', data) } // 广播迭代进度 broadcastProgress(data: IterationProgress) { this.broadcast('iteration.progress', data) } } ``` **验收标准**： - ✅ 所有REST API实现完成 - ✅ WebSocket事件完整推送 - ✅ API响应时间 < 100ms --- ##### 阶段 5：集成与测试（2天） **任务5.1：AutoIterationEngine集成** ```typescript // auto-iteration.ts import { getServices } from './dashboard/server' export class AutoIterationEngine { private iterationService?: any private realtimeService?: any async start() { const services = getServices() this.iterationService = services.iterationService this.realtimeService = services.realtimeService while (this.running && this.shouldContinue()) { const iterationNum = this.iterationCount + 1 // 创建迭代记录 const iteration = await this.iterationService.createIteration({ iterationNumber: iterationNum, status: 'running', requirement: this.requirement }) // 广播迭代开始 this.realtimeService.broadcastIterationStatus({ iterationId: iteration.id, status: 'running', timestamp: new Date() }) // 执行迭代... } } } ``` **任务5.2：编写测试** ```typescript // tests/unit/services/api.test.ts import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest' import { apiClient } from '@/services/api' describe('API Service', () => { it('should fetch iterations', async () => { export type WSEvent = | { event: 'connected'; data: { message: string; timestamp: string } } | { event: 'iteration.started'; data: IterationStartEvent } | { event: 'iteration.status_changed'; data: IterationStatusChangeEvent } | { event: 'iteration.progress'; data: IterationProgressEvent } | { event: 'agent.status_changed'; data: AgentStatusChangeEvent } | { event: 'system.metrics'; data: SystemMetricsEvent } | { event: 'log.entry'; data: LogEntryEvent } | { event: 'ping' | 'pong' } ``` **前端使用示例**: ```typescript // 在组件中使用 import { useWebSocketStore } from '@/stores/websocket' const wsStore = useWebSocketStore() onMounted(() => { wsStore.connect() // 监听迭代状态变化 wsStore.on('iteration.status_changed', (data) => { console.log('Iteration status changed:', data) // 更新 UI }) // 监听 Agent 状态变化 wsStore.on('agent.status_changed', (data) => { console.log('Agent status changed:', data) // 更新 UI }) }) onUnmounted(() => { wsStore.disconnect() }) ``` --- ### 4.2 数据流架构 ```mermaid 功能要求:
- [ ] 连接管理 (连接/断开/重连)
- [ ] 事件订阅/取消订阅
- [ ] 心跳检测
- [ ] 自动重连机制
- [ ] 消息队列 (离线消息缓存)

实现示例:
```typescript
// stores/websocket.ts
import { defineStore } from 'pinia'
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'

export const useWebSocketStore = defineStore('websocket', () => {
  const ws = ref<WebSocket | null>(null)
  const connected = ref(false)
  const reconnectTimer = ref<number | null>(null)
  const subscriptions = ref<Set<string>>(new Set())
  
  // 事件监听器
  const listeners = ref<Map<string, Function[]>>(new Map())

  function connect(url: string = 'ws://localhost:3000/api/ws') {
    if (ws.value?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
      return
    }

    ws.value = new WebSocket(url)

    ws.value.onopen = () => {
      connected.value = true
      console.log('WebSocket 已连接')
      
      // 重新订阅
      subscriptions.value.forEach(channel => {
        emit('subscribe', { channel })
      })

      // 启动心跳
      startHeartbeat()
    }

    ws.value.onclose = () => {
      connected.value = false
      console.log('WebSocket 已断开')
      
      // 自动重连
      scheduleReconnect()
    }

    ws.value.onmessage = (event) => {
      try {
        const { event: eventName, data } = JSON.parse(event.data)
        emit(eventName, data)
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('解析消息失败:', err)
      }
    }

    ws.value.onerror = (error) => {
      console.error('WebSocket 错误:', error)
    }
  }

  function disconnect() {
    if (reconnectTimer.value) {
      clearTimeout(reconnectTimer.value)
      reconnectTimer.value = null
    }
    
    ws.value?.close()
    ws.value = null
    connected.value = false
  }

  function emit(event: string, data: any) {
    if (ws.value?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
      ws.value.send(JSON.stringify({ event, data }))
    }
  }

  function on(event: string, callback: Function) {
    if (!listeners.value.has(event)) {
      listeners.value.set(event, [])
    }
    listeners.value.get(event)!.push(callback)
  }

  function off(event: string, callback: Function) {
    const callbacks = listeners.value.get(event)
    if (callbacks) {
      const index = callbacks.indexOf(callback)
      if (index > -1) {
        callbacks.splice(index, 1)
      }
    }
  }

  function startHeartbeat() {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      if (ws.value?.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
        emit('ping', {})
      } else {
        clearInterval(interval)
      }
    }, 30000) // 每 30 秒发送心跳
  }

  function scheduleReconnect() {
    if (reconnectTimer.value) return
    
    reconnectTimer.value = setTimeout(() => {
      console.log('尝试重新连接...')
      connect()
      reconnectTimer.value = null
    }, 5000) // 5 秒后重连
  }

  return {
    connected,
    connect,
    disconnect,
    emit,
    on,
    off
  }
})
```

```typescript
// api/dashboard.ts
import axios from 'axios'

const api = axios.create({
  baseURL: 'http://localhost:3000/api',
  timeout: 10000,
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  }
})

// 请求拦截器
api.interceptors.request.use(
  (config) => {
    // 添加认证 token
    const token = localStorage.getItem('token')
    if (token) {
      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
    }
    return config
  },
  (error) => {
    return Promise.reject(error)
  }
)

// 响应拦截器
api.interceptors.response.use(
  (response) => response.data,
  (error) => {
    if (error.response) {
      // 处理错误响应
      switch (error.response.status) {
        case 401:
          // 未授权
          break
        case 404:
          // 资源不存在
          break
        case 500:
          // 服务器错误
          break
      }
    }
    return Promise.reject(error)
  }
)

// API 方法
export const dashboardApi = {
  // 系统概览
  getOverview: () => api.get('/overview'),

  // 迭代相关
  getIterations: (params?: any) => api.get('/iterations', { params }),
  getIteration: (id: string) => api.get(`/iterations/${id}`),
  getCurrentIteration: () => api.get('/iterations/current'),
  rollbackIteration: (id: string) => api.post(`/iterations/${id}/rollback`),

  // Agent 相关
  getAgents: () => api.get('/agents'),
  getAgent: (name: string) => api.get(`/agents/${name}`),
  getAgentStats: (name: string) => api.get(`/agents/${name}/stats`),

  // 系统相关
  getSystemMetrics: () => api.get('/system/metrics'),
  getHealth: () => api.get('/system/health'),
  getLogs: (params?: any) => api.get('/system/logs', { params })
}

🔌 三、API接口设计 ### 3.1 REST API 规范 #### 通用响应格式 ```typescript interface ApiResponse { success: boolean data: T message?: string timestamp: number } interface PageResponse { items: T[] total: number page: number limit: number totalPages: number } ``` #### 核心API端点 ```typescript // 系统概览 GET /api/system/overview // 获取系统概览数据 GET /api/system/metrics // 获取系统指标 GET /api/system/health // 健康检查 // 迭代管理 GET /api/iterations // 获取迭代列表(分页) GET /api/iterations/:id // 获取迭代详情 GET /api/iterations/current // 获取当前运行迭代 POST /api/iterations/:id/rollback // 回滚到指定迭代 // Agent监控 GET /api/agents // 获取所有Agent状态 GET /api/agents/:name // 获取特定Agent详情 GET /api/agents/:name/stats // 获取Agent性能统计 // 项目管理 GET /api/projects // 获取项目列表 POST /api/projects // 创建项目 PUT /api/projects/:id // 更新项目配置 DELETE /api/projects/:id // 删除项目 // 日志管理 GET /api/logs // 获取系统日志 GET /api/logs/export // 导出日志 ``` ### 3.2 WebSocket 实时通信规范 #### 连接配置 ```typescript const WS_URL = 'ws://localhost:3000/api/ws' interface WebSocketOptions { heartbeatInterval: number // 心跳间隔 (ms) reconnectInterval: number // 重连间隔 (ms) maxReconnectAttempts: number // 最大重连次数 } ``` #### 事件类型定义 ```typescript // 服务端 -> 客户端事件 type ServerEvent = | IterationStatusEvent // 迭代状态变更 | AgentStatusEvent // Agent状态变更 | IterationProgressEvent // 迭代进度更新 | SystemMetricsEvent // 系统指标更新 | LogEvent // 实时日志 | ErrorEvent // 错误事件 // 示例: 迭代状态变更事件 interface IterationStatusEvent { type: 'iteration.status_changed' data: { iterationId: string iterationNumber: number status: 'running' | 'completed' | 'failed' timestamp: string } } // 示例: Agent状态变更事件 interface AgentStatusEvent { type: 'agent.status_changed' data: { agentName: string agentType: string status: 'idle' | 'running' | 'completed' | 'error' currentTask?: string progress: number timestamp: string } } ``` --- ## 🗄️ 四、数据库设计 ### 4.1 ER图 ```mermaid erDiagram ITERATIONS ||--o{ AGENT_RESULTS : contains ITERATIONS ||--|| GIT_COMMITS : references PROJECTS ||--o{ ITERATIONS : has AGENTS ||--o{ AGENT_RESULTS : produces ITERATIONS { string id PK number iteration_number string requirement string status number duration string created_at string commit_id FK } AGENT_RESULTS { string id PK string iteration_id FK string agent_name string status number duration text output } GIT_COMMITS { string id PK string hash string message string branch number insertions } AGENTS { string name PK string type string status number total_executions string last_activity } ``` ### 4.2 核心表结构 #### iterations 表 ```sql CREATE TABLE iterations ( id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, iteration_number INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE, requirement TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('running', 'completed', 'failed')), duration INTEGER DEFAULT 0, pm_analysis JSON, created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')), updated_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now')), completed_at TEXT, commit_id TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (commit_id) REFERENCES git_commits(id) ); CREATE INDEX idx_iterations_status ON iterations(status); CREATE INDEX idx_iterations_created_at ON iterations(created_at); ``` #### agents 表 ```sql CREATE TABLE agents ( name TEXT PRIMARY KEY, type TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(status IN ('idle', 'running', 'completed', 'error')), total_executions INTEGER DEFAULT 0, success_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, failed_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, last_activity TEXT, config JSON DEFAULT '{}' ); ``` --- ##
